title: contact_set Phase 2b: ContactPatchOp vec is an unnecessary indirection
description: Phase 1 builds a Vec<ContactPatchOp> and Phase 2b immediately loops over it to decompose back into blocked: Option<bool> and display_name: Option<Option<String>>. The Vec buys nothing — the same two Option fields could be set directly in Phase 1 with the same semantics. Suggested rewrite: remove ContactPatchOp enum and the ops vec; replace with let mut blocked: Option<bool> = None; let mut display_name: Option<Option<String>> = None; set directly in Phase 1 validation. The is_empty check becomes (blocked.is_none() && display_name.is_none()) which reads more naturally than ops.is_empty().
